title: R5 weave into meta-aggregators (status_all + health_check_all) — Ω-cycle 2026-04-26
context: R5 (hash-chained rotation ledger + SSH detached signature stub) shipped in the prior iteration as two standalone tools (tool/ledger_verify.sh + tool/registry_sign.sh) plus pre-commit hook updates. They emit __LEDGER_VERIFY__ and __REGISTRY_SIGN__ sentinels, but were not yet visible in the meta-aggregators (atlas_status_all.sh, health_check_all.sh) — meaning no single-page surface and no cron-friendly aggregation. This Ω-cycle weaves R5 into both surfaces so the defense system field-set is complete.

status_all_enrichment.exit_code_logic: DEF_R5_LEDGER=FAIL now triggers EXIT_CODE=2 (consistent with COLLISION_CONF and runtime FAIL)
status_all_enrichment.compat: raw 80 backward-compat preserved — all prior fields (defense_r1_*, defense_r3_full, defense_r4_rotations, timeline_*) retained in original order; R5 fields appended after R4.

health_check_all_enrichment.verdict_logic: L_EC != 0 now joins F_EC/B_EC/S_EC in flipping VERDICT to FAIL (exit 76)
health_check_all_enrichment.human_readable_change: F: %d/%d CLEAN | B: %d/%d PASS | tampered=%d (F=%d B=%d) | S: status_all_%s | L: %s(%d)
health_check_all_enrichment.fix_trailer_added: R5 ledger chain broken — see ledger_verify output for broken_at line; investigate prev_hash mismatch

tested: bash tool/atlas_status_all.sh --brief → R5 fields visible in section 7, summary, sentinel
bash tool/health_check_all.sh → L: EMPTY(0) appears in human line; sentinel includes ledger=EMPTY(0)
bash tool/health_check_all.sh --quiet → sentinel-only output includes ledger field
hexa run cli/run.hexa hexa-sim status-all → CLI dispatch passes through; container path correctly reports R5 as 'missing' (R5 tools live in mac repo only)
hexa run cli/run.hexa hexa-sim health-check-all → CLI dispatch passes through; container reports ledger=MISSING(0)

live_sentinels_post_enrichment.atlas_status_all: __ATLAS_STATUS_ALL__ runtime=stage_5 dashboard_h=2/4 facts=10022 shards=10 staged_atlas=0 collision_dup=0 collision_conflict=0 defense_r1_falsifier=f8078376140a defense_r1_bridge=16 defense_r3_full=no defense_r4_rotations=0 defense_r5_ledger=EMPTY defense_r5_ledger_entries=0 defense_r5_ledger_broken_at=none defense_r5_sign=SKIPPED defense_r5_sign_reason=no_signing_key_configured timeline_lines=127 timeline_last_rot=-
live_sentinels_post_enrichment.health_check_all: __HEALTH_CHECK_ALL__ FAIL falsifier=103/105 bridge=14/16 tampered=2 status=ok ledger=EMPTY(0)

verification.cli_dispatch: Y — both `nexus hexa-sim status-all` and `nexus hexa-sim health-check-all` route through cli/run.hexa to the bash tools; sentinels emit cleanly inside container as well (with 'missing' fallback since R5 tools aren't yet in the container payload).

cron_suggestion.current_state: ledger is EMPTY (0 entries — no rotations have occurred yet; falsifier_registry_rotation_log.jsonl does not exist or has zero lines)
guidance: Now (pre-rotation): no cron needed. ledger_verify is fast (<10ms on EMPTY) and is already invoked transitively by health_check_all whenever it runs.
Post first rotation (when R4 begins emitting JSONL entries): ledger_verify becomes meaningful. Recommend daily via existing health_check_all cron — no new cron entry needed.

If the user adopts SSH signing (R5 OPT-B activation: SIGNING_KEY env or git config user.signingkey set + allowed_signers built): add `bash tool/registry_sign.sh verify` to weekly cron. Verify is read-only, won't block.

Frequency tuning: if registry rotates >1/week (high-churn falsifier authoring period), bump health_check_all from daily to hourly so ledger drift is caught within the rotation window. Below 1/week, daily is fine.
cron_suggestion.do_not_add_yet: No standalone ledger_verify cron entry recommended — health_check_all already covers it as 4th subcheck.

tier_1: tool/atlas_status_all.sh enriched: section 7 expanded with R5 ledger + sign blocks; summary line added; aggregate sentinel extended with 5 new fields (defense_r5_ledger, defense_r5_ledger_entries, defense_r5_ledger_broken_at, defense_r5_sign, defense_r5_sign_reason)
tool/health_check_all.sh enriched: 4th subcheck added (ledger_verify); verdict logic extended to include L_EC; human line extended with 'L: <STATUS>(<N>)'; sentinel extended with ledger=<STATUS>(<N>)

compliance.raw_66: ai-native errors — fix-trailer added for L_EC != 0 case, points at ledger_verify output and prev_hash mismatch investigation path
compliance.raw_71: report-only — no auto-mutation; status_all/health_check_all only read R5 sentinels and aggregate them
compliance.raw_73: minimal — additive only; existing exit-code paths and sentinels untouched except for documented appends
compliance.raw_77: audit-append-only — all R5 fields appended after the R4 cluster in the sentinel; field order of pre-existing fields preserved
compliance.raw_80: sentinel evolution backward-compat — old parsers reading defense_r1_* / defense_r3_full / defense_r4_rotations / timeline_* still see those fields in the same positions; R5 fields are post-R4 additions

criteria: Both meta-aggregators surface R5 ledger + sign status
CLI dispatch (`nexus hexa-sim status-all` / `health-check-all`) passes through unchanged
Live sentinels show R5 fields with current values (EMPTY ledger / SKIPPED sign — expected pre-activation state)
No regression in pre-existing sentinel fields (verified: r1/r3/r4/timeline_* all still present and correctly populated)
next_iteration_seeds: When R4 emits its first rotation entry, re-run health_check_all to confirm ledger transitions EMPTY → PASS with entries=1
When user activates SSH signing (R5 OPT-B), re-run status_all to confirm sign field transitions SKIPPED → SIGNED/VERIFIED
Consider adding R5 ledger broken_at line content to status_all section 7 when status=FAIL (currently only line number is surfaced)
